phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy a Duomo rooftop ticket
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si compra il biglietto per i tetti del Duomo?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see KOM-prah eel beel-YET-toh per ee TET-tee del DWOH-moh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Duomo rooftop is one of Milan's most memorable experiences — book online to avoid queues, especially in summer.

responses.english: Online or at the side ticket desks of the Duomo.
responses.phonetic: on-LEE-neh oh AL-leh KAS-seh lah-teh-RAH-lee del DWOH-moh.
responses.french: Online o alle casse laterali del Duomo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso della Galleria Vittorio Emanuele?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH leen-GRES-soh DEL-lah gal-leh-REE-ah veet-TOH-ryoh eh-mah-NWEH-leh?

responses.english: On the right side of Piazza del Duomo.
responses.phonetic: sool LAH-toh DES-troh DEL-lah PYAHT-tsah del DWOH-moh.
responses.french: Sul lato destro della piazza del Duomo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Last Supper is located
phrases.cultural_note: Leonardo's Last Supper is in Santa Maria delle Grazie — booking months ahead is essential as only 30 visitors enter every 15 minutes.

responses.english: At Santa Maria delle Grazie, away from the Duomo.
responses.phonetic: ah SAN-tah mah-REE-ah DEL-leh GRAH-tsyeh, lon-TAH-noh dal DWOH-moh.
responses.french: A Santa Maria delle Grazie, lontano dal Duomo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find a good espresso near the Duomo
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è un buon bar per il caffè qui vicino?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH oon bwohn bar per eel kaf-FEH kwee vee-CHEE-noh?

responses.english: At Caffè Zucca in the Galleria, historic since 1867.
responses.phonetic: al kaf-FEH DZUK-kah een gal-leh-REE-ah, STOH-ree-koh dal meel-leh-ot-toh-SHEN-toh-seh-SHAN-tah-SEH-teh.
responses.french: Al Caffè Zucca in Galleria, storico dal 1867.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which metro line stops at the Duomo
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale linea della metro ferma al Duomo?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh LEE-neh-ah DEL-lah MEH-troh FER-mah al DWOH-moh?

responses.english: Line one and line three, Duomo exit.
responses.phonetic: lah LEE-neh-ah OO-noh eh lah LEE-neh-ah treh, oo-SHEE-tah DWOH-moh.
responses.french: La linea uno e la linea tre, uscita Duomo.
